last_assistant_message: 我已经读了一遍现有项目。这个仓库本质上是一个 **Jekyll + GitHub Pages 的学术个人主页模板**，来自 `AcadHomepage`，当前还没有开始个人化，里面大部分还是模板占位内容。 你下一步不应该急着大改代码，而是先按“能本地跑起来 → 替换个人信息 → 调整页面结构 → 部署”的顺序做。 --- ## 1. 当前项目现状 你的主项目目录里现在有一个子目录： ```text acad-homepage.github.io/ ``` 里面才是真正的网站代码。 关键文件是： ```text acad-homepage.github.io/_config.yml acad-homepage.github.io/_pages/about.md acad-homepage.github.io/_data/navigation.yml acad-homepage.github.io/Gemfile acad-homepage.github.io/run_server.sh ``` ### 项目技术栈 这是一个 **Jekyll 静态网站**，适合部署到 GitHub Pages。 不是 React / Vue / Next.js 项目，所以主要改： - Markdown - YAML 配置 - 少量 HTML - 少量 SCSS 样式 --- ## 2. 最重要的三个文件 ### A. `_config.yml` 路径： ```text acad-homepage.github.io/_config.yml ``` 这是全站配置文件。现在里面还是模板内容，例如： ```yml title: "Lorem ipsum" description: "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet..." repository: "RayeRen/acad-homepage.github.io" ``` 以及作者信息： ```yml author: name: "Lorem ipsum" avatar: "images/android-chrome-512x512.png" bio: "Lorem ipsum College" location: "Beijing, China" googlescholar: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_GOOGLE_SCHOLAR_ID" email: "Lorem@ipsum.com" ``` 这里需要替换成你的个人信息。 --- ### B. `_pages/about.md` 路径： ```text acad-homepage.github.io/_pages/about.md ``` 这是首页主体内容。当前仍然是模板内容： ```md Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet... ``` 并且包含这些板块： ```md # 🔥 News # 📝 Publications # 🎖 Honors and Awards # 📖 Educations # 💬 Invited Talks # 💻 Internships ``` 你的主页正文主要就是改这个文件。 --- ### C. `_data/navigation.yml` 路径： ```text acad-homepage.github.io/_data/navigation.yml ``` 这是顶部导航栏配置。现在是： ```yml main: - title: "About Me" url: "/#about-me" - title: "News" url: "/#-news" - title: "Publications" url: "/#-publications" - title: "Honors and Awards" url: "/#-honors-and-awards" - title: "Educations" url: "/#-educations" - title: "Invited Talks" url: "/#-invited-talks" - title: "Internships" url: "/#-internships" ``` 如果你不需要 “Invited Talks” 或 “Internships”，可以删掉或改成： - Projects - Experience - Teaching - Service - Contact - Blog --- ## 3. 推荐的开发规划 我建议分成 5 个阶段。 --- # 阶段一：先确认网站能跑起来 进入网站目录后运行： ```bash cd acad-homepage.github.io bundle install bundle exec jekyll liveserve ``` 或者： ```bash bash run_server.sh ``` 但你在 Windows 上，可能 `bash run_server.sh` 不一定最方便。可以优先试： ```bash bundle exec jekyll liveserve ``` 然后打开： ```text http://127.0.0.1:4000 ``` 如果本地没有 Ruby / Bundler / Jekyll 环境，需要先安装 Ruby。这个项目的 `Gemfile` 使用了： ```ruby gem "github-pages", group: :jekyll_plugins gem "wdm", "~> 0.1.0" if Gem.win_platform? ``` 所以它是按 GitHub Pages 兼容环境配置的。 --- # 阶段二：先完成最小可用个人主页 优先改这些信息。 ## 2.1 修改 `_config.yml` 需要替换： ```yml title description repository author.name author.avatar author.bio author.location author.email author.github author.linkedin author.googlescholar author.orcid author.dblp ``` 例如可以改成类似： ```yml title: "Chang Liu" description: "Personal academic homepage of Chang Liu." repository: "ChangLiu-weiyu/ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io" author: name: "Chang Liu" avatar: "images/profile.jpg" bio: "Researcher / Student / Engineer" location: "China" email: "your-email@example.com" github: "ChangLiu-weiyu" googlescholar: linkedin: orcid: ``` 注意 `repository` 很重要，如果你最终仓库叫： ```text ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io ``` 那一般应该是： ```yml repository: "ChangLiu-weiyu/ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io" ``` --- ## 2.2 添加头像 当前仓库里暂时没读到 `images/*` 文件，说明可能还没有头像或图片资源。 你可以新建： ```text acad-homepage.github.io/images/profile.jpg ``` 然后在 `_config.yml` 里设置： ```yml author: avatar: "images/profile.jpg" ``` --- ## 2.3 修改 `_pages/about.md` 建议首页先保留 5 个核心板块： ```md About Me News Publications Projects Education ``` 如果你是学术方向，推荐结构： ```md I am ... # 🔥 News - *2026.07*: Website launched. # 📝 Publications - Paper title, Authors, Venue, Year. [[PDF]](...) [[Code]](...) # 🚀 Projects - **Project name**: one-sentence description. [[GitHub]](...) # 📖 Education - *YYYY.MM - YYYY.MM*, Degree, University. # 📫 Contact - Email: ... ``` 如果你暂时还没有论文，可以把 `Publications` 改成： ```md # 🚀 Projects # 📖 Education # 🛠 Skills # 📫 Contact ``` --- # 阶段三：决定你的主页定位 你需要先确定这个网站的目标。不同目标对应不同结构。 ## 方案 A：学术主页 适合博士、硕士、研究助理、科研人员。 推荐导航： ```yml About News Publications Projects Education Experience Contact ``` 主页重点： - 研究方向 - 论文 - Google Scholar - 项目 - 学术经历 - 获奖 --- ## 方案 B：求职 / 简历主页 适合找实习、找工作、展示工程能力。 推荐导航： ```yml About Projects Experience Skills Education Contact ``` 主页重点： - 技术栈 - 项目展示 - 实习经历 - GitHub - 简历 PDF - 联系方式 --- ## 方案 C：综合个人品牌主页 适合同时展示科研、项目、博客、作品集。 推荐导航： ```yml About Research Projects Blog CV Contact ``` 主页重点： - 个人简介 - 代表作品 - 博客文章 - 简历下载 - 社交链接 --- ## 我建议你采用 如果你 clone 的是 `AcadHomepage`，我建议先按 **学术主页 + 项目展示** 的方向做： ```text About News Publications Projects Education Experience Contact ``` 这样未来无论申请学校、实验室、实习、工作，都比较通用。 --- ## 4. 推荐你下一步具体做什么 我建议下一步按这个顺序： ### Step 1：告诉我你的个人信息 你可以直接发给我这些内容： ```text 姓名： 英文名： 当前身份： 学校 / 单位： 研究方向： 邮箱： GitHub： Google Scholar： ORCID： LinkedIn： 个人头像文件是否已有： 是否有 CV PDF： 是否有论文： 是否有项目： 是否需要中文页面： ``` 不需要一次写得很完美，草稿也可以。 --- ### Step 2：我帮你生成首页初稿 我可以直接帮你改： ```text _config.yml _pages/about.md _data/navigation.yml ``` 把模板占位内容替换成你的主页内容。 --- ### Step 3：本地预览 然后运行： ```bash cd acad-homepage.github.io bundle install bundle exec jekyll liveserve ``` 看效果。 --- ### Step 4：调整视觉和结构 之后再考虑： - 换头像 - 换 favicon - 增加 CV 下载按钮 - 增加项目卡片 - 增加论文图片 - 调整颜色和字体 - 删除不需要的板块 - 增加中文 / 英文双语 --- ### Step 5：部署到 GitHub Pages 最终需要： 1. 仓库名改成： ```text ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io ``` 2. `_config.yml` 里改： ```yml repository: "ChangLiu-weiyu/ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io" ``` 3. push 到 GitHub 的 `main` 分支。 4. 在 GitHub Pages 设置中选择从 `main` 分支部署。 最终访问地址一般是： ```text https://ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io ``` --- ## 5. 当前仓库还有一个需要注意的问题 你现在的 git 状态显示： ```text ?? acad-homepage.github.io/ ``` 也就是说：主仓库 `ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io` 里面又放了一个完整的 `acad-homepage.github.io` 仓库。 这可能会造成一个问题：你现在是 **仓库套仓库**。 当前结构大概是： ```text ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io/ .git/ acad-homepage.github.io/ .git/ _config.yml _pages/ ... ``` 如果你的目标是让 `ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io` 成为真正的网站仓库，我建议后面把 `acad-homepage.github.io/` 里面的内容移动到外层根目录，而不是一直嵌套着。 最终理想结构应该是： ```text ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io/ _config.yml _pages/ _data/ _includes/ _layouts/ _sass/ assets/ images/ Gemfile README.md ``` 而不是： ```text ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io/ acad-homepage.github.io/ _config.yml _pages/ ``` 否则 GitHub Pages 可能不会按你预期部署。 --- ## 6. 我建议的下一步 我建议下一步先做两件事： 1. **整理仓库结构**：把 `acad-homepage.github.io` 的内容迁移到外层根目录。 2. **替换模板信息**：改 `_config.yml`、`_pages/about.md`、`_data/navigation.yml`。 如果你愿意，我可以下一步直接帮你做一个“第一版个人主页骨架”，包括： - 修正仓库结构 - 删除模板 lorem ipsum - 设置导航栏 - 生成首页中文/英文内容框架 - 保留论文、项目、教育、经历等板块 - 留出你后续填写的占位位置 你只需要告诉我：你希望这个主页主要用于 **学术展示**、**求职简历**，还是 **综合个人主页**？

已按你的选择完成第一步改造：把 `acad-homepage.github.io` 子目录里的 Jekyll 网站移动到了外层仓库根目录，并做了一个“综合个人主页”的中英双语骨架。

主要改动：

- 网站现在位于仓库根目录，适合 `ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io` 这种 GitHub Pages 仓库直接部署。
- 更新了 [_config.yml](D:\Users\liuch\Desktop\code\ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io\_config.yml:9)，站点标题、描述、repository 和作者基础信息已改成 `Chang Liu | 刘畅`。
- 更新了 [_data/navigation.yml](D:\Users\liuch\Desktop\code\ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io\_data\navigation.yml:1)，导航改成综合主页结构：
  `About / Projects / Writing / Experience / CV / Contact`
- 重写了 [_pages/about.md](D:\Users\liuch\Desktop\code\ChangLiu-weiyu.github.io\_pages\about.md:1)，现在是中英双语骨架，占位包括：
  `About / Projects / Writing / Experience / Education / Work & Research / Honors / CV / Contact`
- 删除了移动后只剩 `.git` 元数据的嵌套目录，避免仓库套仓库影响后续提交和部署。

验证情况：

- 文件结构已经调整到根目录。
- 我尝试运行 `bundle exec jekyll build`，但当前系统没有识别 `bundle` 命令，说明本机还没装好 Ruby/Bundler，或者它不在 PATH 里。

你下一步需要做的是：

1. 安装 Ruby + Bundler/Jekyll 环境。
2. 在项目根目录运行：

```powershell
bundle install
bundle exec jekyll liveserve
```

3. 打开：

```text
http://127.0.0.1:4000
```

4. 后续把这些占位内容逐步替换成真实信息：
   `邮箱、头像 images/profile.jpg、CV 文件 files/cv.pdf、项目、教育经历、文章、Google Scholar/LinkedIn 等链接`。

当前 `git status` 里所有网站文件都是未跟踪状态，这是正常的，因为外层仓库之前基本是空的。等你确认页面方向后，再 `git add` / `commit` / `push` 即可。

Hi, I am **Chang Liu**, an undergraduate student at Wuhan University. I am currently studying E-Commerce at the School of Information Management, after transferring from Software Engineering at the School of Computer Science.

My work sits at the intersection of **AI applications, product building, digital humanities, and entrepreneurship community operations**. I enjoy turning ideas into working products, organizing people around emerging technologies, and exploring how AI can be used in research, education, and real-world communities.

I have worked on AI Agent education, GraphRAG-based question answering, digital humanities visualization, and campus-level AI events. I am also active in hackathons, student organizations, and local AI founder communities in Wuhan.

**Current focus**

- AI Agent applications and AI education
- AI for Science / AI for Social Science
- Digital humanities and knowledge graph visualization
- Product management, community operations, and entrepreneurship ecosystems

## Projects

### Xu Xiake Digital Humanities Map Platform

A digital humanities platform based on *The Travels of Xu Xiake*, combining NLP, spatiotemporal narrative, and interactive visualization.

I was responsible for the NLP-related implementation, including entity recognition, event extraction, backend development, and frontend platform construction. The project uses GuwenBERT and custom extraction rules to transform classical Chinese travel texts into structured events and visual narratives.

The related first-author work has been accepted by **CDH 2025** and **DH 2026**, and the platform has been registered as software copyright.

Links:

- Code: https://gitee.com/wei-rain-light-dust/xu-xiake-visualization

---

### Taikang Healthcare GraphRAG Question Answering System

An enterprise-oriented intelligent question answering system for healthcare, insurance, and elderly-care scenarios.

I led the design and implementation of a GraphRAG-based architecture that combines knowledge graph retrieval with LLM reasoning. The system uses Neo4j to connect disease, medicine, insurance, and elderly-care data, and provides a FastAPI backend with a Streamlit frontend.

The project explores how knowledge graphs can reduce hallucination and improve reliability in vertical-domain LLM applications.

Links:

- Code: https://github.com/Nelly-se/Knowledge-Graph-Construction

---

### Wuhan University 鈥淰olcano Cup鈥� AI Agent Innovation Competition

A campus-wide AI Agent innovation competition at Wuhan University.

I was responsible for event planning, promotion, training, and participant support. I independently authored an AI Agent training knowledge base, translating LLM concepts into practical workflows based on prompts and automation. The event reached **1,000+ students** and attracted **370+ teams**, helping students from different disciplines build practical AI Agent applications.

---

### NewsPulse

A mobile news product developed during the ByteDance frontend training camp.

I led the product definition and full-stack implementation of the MVP. The product focused on lowering the barrier to content creation and improving mobile reading experience, with features such as intelligent drafts and AI topic recommendations.

## About

Hi, I am **Chang Liu**, an undergraduate student at Wuhan University. I previously studied Software Engineering at the School of Computer Science and am now studying E-Commerce at the School of Information Management.

My interests lie at the intersection of **AI applications, product building, digital humanities, AI education, and entrepreneurship ecosystems**. I enjoy turning abstract ideas into working products, organizing people around emerging technologies, and exploring how AI can be applied in education, research, public-interest communities, and real-world products.

I am currently focusing on AI Agents, AI for Science / Social Science, digital humanities, youth AI education, and product opportunities around **AI + hardware + companionship**.

### Current Focus

- **AI Agents and AI literacy education**: building low-barrier learning and practice systems for users from non-CS backgrounds.
- **Yubing ecosystem building**: building an infrastructure platform for AI literacy, youth science-and-technology education, and innovation practice.
- **AI + hardware + companionship**: exploring products that combine AI, physical devices, long-term companionship, emotional interaction, and youth development scenarios.
- **Digital humanities and knowledge graph visualization**: using NLP, knowledge graphs, and visualization to make classical texts and complex knowledge easier to understand.
- **Entrepreneurship communities**: connecting universities, developers, founders, companies, and public-interest organizations to help AI projects move from ideas to real-world implementation.

---

## Projects

### Yubing: Youth AI Education and Innovation Practice Ecosystem

Yubing is an innovation ecosystem platform that starts from youth AI education and aims to build infrastructure for broader AI literacy, science-and-technology education, and innovation practice.

Through **AI + hardware, AI + video, AI + software, and open co-created courses**, the project connects universities, governments, companies, public-interest organizations, and developer communities.

The name 鈥淵ubing鈥� comes from the phrase 鈥滃�忚櫕涓嶅彲璇�鍐扳�� in *Zhuangzi*, symbolizing the effort to break cognitive limits and make the seemingly impossible understandable, learnable, and creatable.

---

### Xu Xiake Digital Humanities Map Platform

A digital humanities platform based on *The Travels of Xu Xiake*, combining NLP, spatiotemporal narrative, and interactive visualization.

I was responsible for the NLP-related implementation, including entity recognition, event extraction, backend development, and frontend platform construction. The project uses GuwenBERT and custom extraction rules to transform classical Chinese travel texts into structured events and visual narratives.

The related first-author work has been accepted by **CDH 2025** and **DH 2026**, and the platform has been registered as software copyright.

Link:

- Gitee: https://gitee.com/wei-rain-light-dust/xu-xiake-visualization

---

### Taikang Healthcare GraphRAG Question Answering System

An enterprise-oriented intelligent question answering system for healthcare, insurance, and elderly-care scenarios.

I led the design and implementation of a GraphRAG-based architecture that combines knowledge graph retrieval with LLM reasoning. The system uses Neo4j to connect disease, medicine, insurance, and elderly-care data, and provides a FastAPI backend with a Streamlit frontend.

The project explores how knowledge graphs can reduce hallucination and improve reliability in vertical-domain LLM applications.

Link:

- GitHub: https://github.com/Nelly-se/Knowledge-Graph-Construction

---

### Wuhan University 鈥淰olcano Cup鈥� AI Agent Innovation Competition

A campus-wide AI Agent innovation competition at Wuhan University.

I was responsible for event planning, promotion, training, and participant support. I independently authored an AI Agent training knowledge base, translating LLM concepts into practical workflows based on prompts and automation. The event reached **1,000+ students** and attracted **370+ teams**, helping students from different disciplines build practical AI Agent applications.

---

### NewsPulse

A mobile news product developed during the ByteDance frontend training camp.

I led the product definition and full-stack implementation of the MVP. The product focused on lowering the barrier to content creation and improving mobile reading experience, with features such as intelligent drafts and AI topic recommendations.
